name: Peshawar
overview: On the morning of 16th December 2014, a batch of Taliban extremists scaled the walls of a peaceful army school and mercilessly massacred more than hundred innocent children. Witness the chronicles of this heart-wrenching act of vengeance against Pakistan Army and the fearless combat by a handful of commandos that saved the lives of many others

trailers.title: PESHAWAR | Official Trailer | ULLU Originals | Releasing on 16th December
